name: Bar Crawls / Pub Crawls
social_dynamics: Moving group energy, strangers becoming friends, shared mission to visit multiple venues, collective decision-making
cultural_notes: Organized or spontaneous. Popular for birthdays, bachelor/bachelorette parties, and tourists exploring nightlife districts.
safety_notes: Easy to lose the group during venue transitions
recommendations: Keep the crawl map/schedule saved offline
Share your location with a friend

name: Expat & Digital Nomad Meetups
social_dynamics: Networking, friendship-seeking, sharing tips about the city, building community away from home
cultural_notes: Lifeline for foreigners in a new city. Often organized through Facebook or Meetup.com.
recommendations: Keep personal contact info private until trust is built

name: Cultural Events & Festivals
cultural_notes: From Oktoberfest to Day of the Dead to Carnival. Heartbeat of local culture.
safety_notes: Dense crowds can lead to pickpocketing

name: Pub Trivia
social_dynamics: Teams competing, mix of focus and socializing, collective brainpower, friendly rivalry
cultural_notes: Weekly tradition in many pubs. Prizes (often bar tabs) add stakes.
recommendations: Arrive early to join a 'free agent' team

name: Structured Dance Lessons
social_dynamics: Learning together, rotating partners, overcoming awkwardness, shared progress
cultural_notes: Salsa, swing, tango, or line dancing. Great for singles.
safety_notes: Risk of minor physical injury (stepped-on toes)

name: Karaoke Night
social_dynamics: Supportive cheering, taking turns, inside jokes forming, liquid courage in effect
cultural_notes: Everyone's a star for 3-5 minutes. Group participation is key.
safety_notes: Potential for minor verbal friction from intoxicated singers
recommendations: Protect your hearing near the stage

name: Sports Viewing Party
social_dynamics: Collective emotional journey, strangers high-fiving, euphoria at wins
cultural_notes: Turns a bar into a temporary community of believers.
safety_notes: Potential for conflict between opposing fans

name: Bar Game Tournament
social_dynamics: Friendly competition, brackets, trash talk, regulars competing
cultural_notes: Pool, darts, shuffleboard. Winners get bar tab or trophy.

name: Open Mic Night
social_dynamics: Supportive audience, nervous performers, discovery of local talent, intimate vibe
cultural_notes: Where local artists test material. Comedy, music, poetry.
recommendations: Sit near back for quick exit
